title: Militaryism
description: This modpack adds many military aspects to vanilla minecraft.
body:
![Militaryism](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78141a017d2c2cf6d7e7ebf5af33ae2aebd317f6_0.webp)

# Militaryism

**Militaryism** aims to add many different firearms and modern-day tanks and other different military vechicles. **Militaryism** also aims to add many different other blocks into the game such as barbed wires, security cameras, raders and many many others.

**Militaryism** is also for people who are playing a server or making a server simulating a war of some sorts and doesn't want people to download all the mods by themselves as it wastes time.

### PLEASE ALLOCATE AT LEAST 5 GB OF RAM INTO THE GAME OR ELSE IT WILL CRASH

## 
**strapig is NOT responsible for any recreation of any real-world events which has occured.
strapig does not condone any recreation of any real-world events such as school shootings.**
